description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Occult

Your soul fully departs your skeleton, leaving your body behind as an inanimate shell. For up to 1 minute, your soul becomes an incorporeal spirit:

  • Your soul can move up to 60 feet from your body in any direction (including vertically).
  • As a spirit, you are immune to physical damage and invisible to creatures without darkvision or see invisible.
  • You can perceive normally and communicate telepathically with allies within 60 feet.
  • Your body remains inanimate but cannot be destroyed; it is merely broken at worst while your soul roams.

You can return to your body as a free action. If your body is moved beyond 60 feet while you are separated, you are immediately forced back into it.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound.
